agents.name: Intent
agents.purpose: Remove ambiguity from tasks and ensure the actual goal is met.

agents.name: Optimiser
agents.purpose: Allocate resources and aim to spend up to 60% of available resources in any situation.

agents.name: Simples
agents.purpose: Find the most effective path with the fewest components needed to reach the goal.

agents.name: Efficiency
agents.purpose: Find waste, dead code, and unnecessary structure; judge the design as if built from scratch with the patches already known.

agents.name: Orchestrator
agents.purpose: Coordinate the agent loop and report progress back to the main task.

agents.name: Builder
agents.purpose: The only agent that writes the system's code. Builds on branches, checkpoint-first; the council plans and reviews but never writes.
